name: feedcontext-skill
description: Source repository and installable artifact for the FeedContext Skill

scripts.build: pnpm run build:schema && pnpm run build:helper && git diff --exit-code -- skills/feedcontext/schemas/structured-synthesis.schema.json skills/feedcontext/scripts/helper.mjs
scripts.build:helper: bun build src/feedcontext.ts --format esm --packages bundle --target node --minify --outfile skills/feedcontext/scripts/helper.mjs
